title: olearia rudis
intro: Olearia rudis, also known as rough tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its leaves and stems containing sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Olearia rudis have been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, antimicrobial activities, and potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Olearia rudis can be found in tea, tincture, and infusions, and are often used to support immune function and reduce the severity of colds and flu.
